questions.q: Which of Nielsen's 10 usability heuristics is most directly concerned with preventing user errors?
What does 'A/B testing' involve in a digital marketing context?
answers: Testing two versions of a page to see which performs better
Comparing paid and organic search results
Running ads on two different platforms simultaneously
Comparing email open rates across two campaigns

questions.q: In e-commerce, what is the term for a user who adds items to a cart but doesn't complete the purchase?
Which metric best measures the long-term revenue value a customer generates for a business?
What is the primary purpose of a sprint retrospective in Scrum?
answers: To plan the next sprint's work
To inspect and adapt the team's process
To demonstrate completed features to stakeholders

questions.q: In SEO, what does a 'canonical tag' signal to search engines?
answers: The page should be excluded from indexing
This is the preferred version of a duplicate page
The page loads faster than alternatives

questions.q: What is 'dark social' in the context of digital marketing analytics?
answers: Sharing via private channels that analytics tools can't track
Social media posts that are hidden from public view

questions.q: Which e-commerce pricing strategy involves charging different prices to different customer segments for the same product?
